message:
[review-fix] Align fuzz arithmetic oracle with pandas

Make the fp-conformance column arithmetic fuzz oracle use the same Python-style modulo and floor-divide semantics as fp-columnar, including infinite divisors and signed integer remainders.

Validation: cargo fmt --check -p fp-conformance; git diff --check -- crates/fp-conformance/src/lib.rs; ubs crates/fp-conformance/src/lib.rs; rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-conformance fuzz_column_arith_bytes -- --nocapture; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fp-conformance --all-targets -- -D warnings.
